items.content: Oil prices now crossing above $115/barrel in US. If sustained ~7 more weeks, US CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7% — highest since Sept 2023.

BREAKING: US stock market futures fall at open as Trump declares Tuesday 'Power Plant and Bridge Day' in Iran. S&P -0.7%, Nasdaq -0.8%, DJ -0.7%, WTI +3.0%, Nat Gas +1.0%, Gold -0.9%. Deadline: Tuesday.
BREAKING: US oil prices surge above $114/barrel as US market futures reopen after 3-day weekend.
JUST IN: $69,000 Bitcoin — $100,000,000 worth of crypto shorts liquidated in past 90 minutes.
JUST IN: $2,100 ETH

IRAN DEFIES TRUMP: 'STRAIT OF HORMUZ WILL NEVER RETURN TO FORMER STATE' — OIL TOPS $110. Iran's IRGC flatly rejected Trump's ultimatum, declaring Strait of Hormuz permanently closed to US/Israeli interests.
items.market_data: Oil tops $110+, Strait of Hormuz closed

items.content: $CL Oil prices rising again after Trump threatened Iran over Strait of Hormuz closure. Brent ~$110, WTI +3% to $115. War impacted oil, gas, food, commodities availability.
US equity-index futures dropped and oil climbed after Trump's warning of significant escalation in Iran war, worsening energy-price shock upending global economic outlook.
items.market_data: Equity futures down, oil up, global economic outlook worsening

items.content: Gas Buddy Arizona Gas Price Stats: $3.89 Low / $4.75 Average. Oil prices rose Sunday with US crude topping $114/bbl after Trump gave Iran until Tuesday to open Strait of Hormuz or face attacks on power plants.
items.market_data: US gasoline prices rising, US crude $114+

items.content: USrael-Iran War EOD sitrep (Apr 5): Iran refuses to open Strait of Hormuz without full war compensation. Tehran won't make concessions before April 7. Strait opens only after full war compensation is paid.
items.market_data: Iran demands war compensation before Strait opens

items.content: President Trump on Sunday issued renewed ultimatum to Iran, threatening to bomb critical energy infrastructure if not open Strait of Hormuz — a transit route for 1/5 of world's oil and gas. Citing NYTimes timeline of Trump's ultimatums.
items.market_data: Trump ultimatum: open Strait or face infrastructure strikes

items.content: Trump to Axios (Apr 5): 'Iran deal possible by Tues., otherwise I am blowing up everything.' Source: axios.com
items.market_data: Trump-Axios: deal by Tuesday or total destruction

items.content: NOW: Iran rejected latest US ceasefire proposal and refused to open Strait of Hormuz. US military-IDF operational coordination completed after high-level meeting last Thursday involving Chief of Staff and CENTCOM leadership.
Wall Street Journal: Iran refused proposal for temporary ceasefire in exchange for opening Strait of Hormuz.
Trump is having a mental breakdown and he's begging Iran for a ceasefire.
Iran just signaled they have no interest in a ceasefire deal. Tuesday is going to be epic.
ABC News: 'President Trump said Sunday that if no peace deal is reached with Iran in the next 48 hours, we're blowing up the entire country.' Selina Wang reports from White House.
items.market_data: Trump: no deal = 'blowing up entire country'

items.content: This is naive. Multiple leaders/politicians were assassinated in Iran & thousands of targets bombed. You can't kill a leader & expect them to agree to ceasefire when attacker asks.
America doesn't buy gas from Iran. America will just take gas from Iran if it wants to. Iran will be left in ruins if they don't make a deal with Trump. 🇺🇸
Trump said specifically if he was president there would be no war with Iran because he would get a deal. Stop lying.
Iran will not surrender to Israel. They will not be Israel's bitch. No deal unless Trump agrees to Iran's demands.
So I'm betting on Trump announcing a deal with Iran by Tuesday and oil price crashes.
items.market_data: Bet: deal by Tuesday → oil crash

key_developments: Trump ultimatum: Iran deal by Tuesday April 7 OR 'blowing up everything'
Iran rejected US ceasefire proposal, refuses to open Strait of Hormuz
US-IDF operational coordination completed after high-level meeting
Iran demands full war compensation before Strait can reopen
Oil surged: WTI ~$115 (+3%), Brent ~$110 at market open
Stock futures: S&P -0.7%, Nasdaq -0.8%, Dow -0.7%; Gold -0.9%
Kobeissi Letter: Oil at $115 sustained 7 weeks → CPI 3.7%
Crypto: BTC $69K, ETH $2,100; $100M crypto shorts liquidated
Axios: Deal possible by Tuesday, otherwise 'blowing up everything'
